parameters: Hey! You can't go in there!
What can I do for you?
Why are you still here? Go away!
Hello... How can I help you?

\c[4]Receptionist:\c[0]
Excuse me, miss! Where do you think you are going?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I wanted to meet with Mr. Albert, the CEO.

\c[4]Receptionist:\c[0]
Really! You thought you'd just go and meet with the CEO of a multi-billion bucks company without an appointment!

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Hey! There is no need for name-calling!

\c[4]Receptionist:\c[0]
Now, go away. Before I call security.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] That bitch will never let me in without an appointment.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] And there is no way I can get an appointment.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I'm lucky she didn't recognize who I am. Otherwise, she would have called security.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Wait a minute! Is that Alex?\c[0])

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
I'm telling you, man, I met the most wonderful girl in my life last night.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
She approached me and asked for a drink.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
And the gentleman I'm, I couldn't refuse.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I approached him! What a fucking liar!\c[0])

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
After talking with her for a while, we went to the restroom and made sweet love.

\c[4]Alex's Friend:\c[0]
You are so cool, man! I would never be able to do something like that.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
After talking with her for a while, she fell for me hard, man.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
She was so charmed by me that she wanna had sex right then.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
But since my apartment was under renovation, I told her I couldn't take her there.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
But she was so desperate, she even offered to do it in the restroom.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
But I'm a proper gentleman. So I told her I couldn't do that and left.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Now I'm interested to see what his reaction will be once he sees me behind him.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Maybe I can use it to my own advantage.\c[0])

\c[4]Alex's Friend:\c[0]
Dude! Is this the girl you were talking about?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Your charm, my dear. I couldn't resist your charm. So I had to come and see you.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Shit! You heard me talking to my friend.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, you weren't very discrete about it.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Look, I'm very sorry. I was just messing with him.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
So, why are you here unless you were telling the truth?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Remember last night when I told you I was taking a break from work?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I wasn't completely honest with you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
The truth is, I lost my job.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
So I thought, since you are such an important employee of this company, you might be able to help me get a job.
(\c[2]Alex:\c[23] Fuck! I knew I shouldn't have bragged so much!\c[0])

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Err...Listen, since we are being honest, I also have a confession to make.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
I actually joined just a couple of months ago.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
And my job is not even permanent yet. So, I'm sorry, but I can't do anything for you.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And here I thought you might be able to help me.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Nah, forget it. Don't think you can do it.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
No, no, please, tell me what is on your mind?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, if I can meet with your boss...

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
I might have convinced him to give me a job.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Umm, I don't think I can help you with that.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Very few people have access to the top floor. And I'm definitely not one of them.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And here I thought if you could help me, we could spend some more quality time together.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
And here I thought if you help me, I might change my mind about spending some quality time together.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah. But I guess it doesn't matter.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Maybe...maybe there is something I can do.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
I can help you go to the top floor.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
But after that, you are on your own.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
You can use the elevator to go to the top floor.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
But unless you have an appointment, the receptionist won't let you use that.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
So if we somehow manage to distract her so that you can sneak past her unseen...

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Got it. But how do we do that?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Well, I think the receptionist has a crush on me.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
I'll keep her busy, so you can sneak past her.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Are you sure you can keep her distracted?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Of course, I can. Have some faith.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
I charmed you last night, haven't I?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Nevermind that. Right now, focus on her.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Alright. But before I go, you need to buy a hotdog.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Seriously! Are you thinking about food right now?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
There is a food vendor outside the building.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Umm, it's embarrassing, but can you lend me some money? I don't have enough to buy hotdogs.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Thanks. I'll pay you back as soon as I can.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Cool. Now you stay hidden somewhere close while I go there and use my charm on her.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Once she is distracted, you can sneak past her.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
But before I go, I have to ask you something.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Are you sure you wanna do this?

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
He is the CEO of this company. You can't just barge into his office and ask for a job.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Most likely, he will call security or, even worse, call the cops for trespassing.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Well then, in that case, I wish you good luck.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I hope the receptionist really has a crush on him, and he is not just imagining it.\c[0])

\c[4]Maria:\c[0]
Yes...Yes, it is! You know my name!

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
You do such an important job. How can I not know you!

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Most people think working as a receptionist is very easy. You have to answer the phone sometimes, and that's it.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
But not me. I know how difficult your job can be.

\c[4]Maria:\c[0]
Just now, I had to stop an idiot from using the elevator without any appointment.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
You do such hard work. You must be hungry.

\c[4]Maria:\c[0]
Hotdog! My favorite! How do you know?
(\c[2]Alex:\c[23] It's not that difficult to Guess since I see you devour those ten to twelve times a day.\c[0])
(\c[23]She was now looking at him with very dreamy eyes.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I will be damned! Didn't think it would work.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I should take my chances before she comes back to her senses.\c[0])

\c[2]Security Guard:\c[0]
Excuse me, miss. I will need to see your ID before I let you in.

\c[2]Security Guard:\c[0]
I'm talking about your employee ID, and you are supposed to wear it on your neck while inside the building.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Fuck! I didn't need anything like that last time I was here.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] They must have tightened up the security since then.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, I don't actually work here. I am here to see someone.

\c[2]Security Guard:\c[0]
And do you have an appointment for that?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Well, it's not an official meeting. More like visiting a friend.

\c[2]Security Guard:\c[0]
You realize that this is a place of work, not a place for a casual meetup with friends?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Can't you make an exception for me?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
All I want to do is go there and say hi to them. Won't take more than a few minutes.

\c[2]Security Guard:\c[0]
Sorry, I can't do that. Or I might lose my job.

\c[2]Security Guard:\c[0]
I heard that someone got inside the CEO's office uninvited a while back.

\c[2]Security Guard:\c[0]
Because of that, he fired the entire security team, including his secretary.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Fuck! So I am the reason for that!\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Who knew my action would have that many consequences.\c[0])

\c[2]Security Guard:\c[0]
So, if you want to see your friends that badly, wait for them here until their work is done.

\c[2]Security Guard:\c[0]
Or meet with them somewhere else after office hours.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Yeah! I can't convince him to let me in. Not when his job is on the line.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I have to find another way to get in.\c[0])

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Yeah, I suppose I could meet them somewhere else.

\c[2]Security Guard:\c[0]
That would be for the best.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] There are only two ways I can get in.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Either I have to get a job there or get an appointment.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] And neither of them is not possible for me.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] If only I knew someone who could have done it for me...\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] But will he do something so risky for someone he barely knows?\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Even if we slept together before, it had no deeper meaning.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] And there is nothing I can offer in return for his help.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] But that is my only hope now.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] At least I should talk to him about it and see how it goes.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] He strikes me as a decent person.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] If I tell him my story, he might be willing to help me out of goodwill.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Alright. That's what I am going to do.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] If I remember correctly, he lives in an \c[13]Apartment Building\c[23] Downtown.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] I should go in the \c[13]Evening\c[23] when he is home.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Receptionist:\c[0]\<
Hey! Where do you think you’re going?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I’m here to meet with your new CEO.

\>\c[2]Receptionist:\c[0]\<
Wait a minute... I remember you. Didn’t I send you away before?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Go ahead. But don’t expect it to go the way you think.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I’m here because your new CEO, Miss Samantha, invited me.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I wonder how she’d feel knowing you tried to have her guest escorted out.

\>\c[2]Receptionist:\c[0]\<
Y-You’re lying. Why would she invite someone like you?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Why don’t you call her and find out?

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Let me do it for you then.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Your receptionist wants to talk to you. She doesn’t believe that you asked me here.
(\c[23]Jane extends the phone, gesturing for her to take it.\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Go on. You wouldn’t want to keep your CEO waiting.
(\c[23]The receptionist glared at Jane before reluctantly taking the phone.\c[0])

\>\c[2]Receptionist:\c[0]\<
You should’ve told me you were friends with Miss Samantha.

\>\c[2]Receptionist:\c[0]\<
Anyway, you’re free to go. And... um... sorry if I came off as a bit rude.
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< She sure changed her attitude fast.\c[0])
(\>\c[3]Jane:\c[23]\< But am I ready to forgive her that easily?\c[0])

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I’d say you were more than just a little rude. Maybe I should bring it up to Samantha.

\>\c[2]Receptionist:\c[0]\<
I’m really, really sorry. I promise I’ll do better from now on.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
I’ll hold you to that. If I ever catch you being rude to anyone…

\>\c[2]Receptionist:\c[0]\<
I won’t! I swear on my life. Just please, give me another chance.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
Fine. I won’t say anything—as long as you work on that nasty attitude of yours.

\>\c[3]Jane:\c[0]\<
But do try to treat others a bit nicely.

\>\c[2]Receptionist:\c[0]\<
I... I will keep it in mind.
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] Never thought I would be back here again.\c[0])
(\c[3]Jane:\c[23] If I remember correctly, the boss's office is on the top floor.\c[0])

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Wait, I can see from your face that it didn't go well.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Don't be. It was a long shot, anyway.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Yeah. But look, GRN is not the only company out here, and I'm sure you will get a job elsewhere.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Wait, I know it's probably not the right time to ask you this, But I really like you, and umm...will you go out with me?

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
Look, I'm not in the right mind for dating right now.

\c[3]Jane:\c[0]
But why don't you give me the address of your apartment? I might visit you sometime.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
Well, I live in an apartment complex Downtown. You can find it on your Map.

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
My apartment is on the ground floor, flat number is \c[13]101\c[0].

\c[2]Alex:\c[0]
And make sure to go there in the evening. Because I'll be at work in the daytime.
Buy \c[13]two\c[0] hotdogs from the \c[13]hotdog stand\c[0] outside.
You can't go inside without an employee ID.
